headerTitle: Forward Deployed Software Engineer  ·  AI-Native Development  ·  Claude Code Daily  ·  Full Production Ownership
subjectText: Forward Deployed Software Engineer — Curative (Remote) · $217,500 — Will Austin
intro: Curative’s forward deployed engineer sits with clinical teams, hears what’s broken, and ships the fix the same week. Four external FDE engagements across roofing, home services, auto repair, and OOH advertising — healthcare domain is new, AI-native forward-deployed execution is not. Claude Code is the primary engineering environment across all 13 production platforms. Not a plugin. The actual surface where architecture decisions and production requirements become working software.
bullets: AI-native development as primary mode — Claude Code CLI as the primary engineering environment daily — exactly what Curative describes. Parallel agents for implementation, review, and debugging. Directing AI output, not accepting it. Every AI-generated diff reviewed before merge. Opinions about prompt architecture, subagent task splitting, and keeping AI from drifting on complex codebases.

Forward-deployed software engineering — four complete external cycles: workflow review with non-technical operators, requirement extraction under operational pressure, implementation, adoption, documented handoff. Embedded with owners, ops leads, and crew managers; shipped working software within two weeks on every engagement. Zero missed scopes.

Python and TypeScript full-stack, single production owner — 13 production platforms: Node.js + Next.js 15 App Router, Python data pipelines (1.4M+ property records, batch AI processing), PostgreSQL/Prisma ORM, BullMQ + Redis, Docker, PM2, Nginx. Owned code review, architecture decisions, production monitoring, and iteration across all of them. No handoffs, no waiting on another team.
closingLine: The operating model Curative is hiring for — AI-native forward deployment, Claude Code as primary environment, Python + TypeScript full-stack ownership, and embedded stakeholder translation — is the current daily reality. Available immediately. TX-based, remote-eligible.
matchNotes: Highest match in pipeline. Explicitly AI-native mandatory (Claude Code named directly), Python+TypeScript full-stack, embedded FDE with ops team, single owner of production service. The 'AI-first working style' section is a literal description of Will's workflow. Healthcare domain is new but JD explicitly says not required. $217.5K exceptional. Top priority application.
